title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at NSE

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at NSE
jsonLd.description:
NSE is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Dhanbad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About NSE:
NSE is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NSE!
